name: Owner
description: Organization creator with full control. Only role that can manage organization-level settings, permanently delete members, and change roles. Cannot be demoted if last active owner.
permissions: Permanently delete members (triggers Keycloak account deletion)
constraints: LAST_OWNER — cannot be demoted if last active owner in organization

name: Admin
description: Organization administrator. Can manage members (except owners), data sources, and most features. Cannot manage organization-level settings or permanently delete members.
permissions: Invite and remove members (soft delete only, not owners)
constraints: INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS — cannot modify owner role or status

name: Standard User
description: Regular organization member. Can use chat and manage their own content. Blocked from settings, member management, data sources, agents, and ticket clusters at the router level.
permissions: Create and view own conversations (max 20, oldest auto-deleted)

name: Iframe User
description: User accessing Rita through the Actions Platform (Jarvis) iframe embed. Identity comes from Valkey session written by host platform. Automatically provisioned on first iframe load. No Keycloak login page.
permissions: Interact with workflow results (reasoning steps, completion cards)
constraints: Session scoped to Valkey key from host platform
Bypasses org membership check (trust host app auth)
No sidebar, no navigation, no settings access
auth_flow: Host Keycloak → Valkey session → sessionKey URL param → JIT provisioning → session cookie
